debug_info.goal:
p : ℕ
e : Expression p
ae : AffineExpression p
⊢ some ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e → AffineExpression.eval p ae = e.eval

failed_attempts:
intro h
  have h1 : ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e := by
    simpa using h
  have h2 : (AffineExpression.ofExpression? e).eval = e.eval := by
    match e with
    | .const n =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval]
    | .var x =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval]
    | .add e1 e2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval]
      <;> try { tauto }
      <;> try { aesop }
    | .mul e1 e2 =>
      simp [AffineExpression.ofExpression?, AffineExpression.eval]
      <;> try { tauto }
      <;> try { aesop }
  rw [h1]
  exact h2

intro h
  have h1 : e.eval = AffineExpression.eval p ae := by
    have h2 : e.eval = (AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e).map.eval := by
      simp [Expression.eval, AffineExpression.eval, ofExpression?]
      <;> aesop
      <;> try { tauto }
    have h3 : (AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e).map.eval = ae.eval := by
      have h4 : (AffineExpression.ofExpression? p e).map = ae := by
        simpa using h
      rw [h4]
    rw [h2, h3]
  linarith [h1]

intro h
  rw [Option.some_eq] at h
  rw [h]
  match e with
  | const n =>
    simp [ofExpression?, eval]
  | var x =>
    simp [ofExpression?, eval]
  | add e1 e2 =>
    simp [ofExpression?, eval]
    <;> aesop
  | mul e1 e2 =>
    simp [ofExpression?, eval]
    <;> aesop

intro h
  rw [h]
  all_goals
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.ofExpression?]
    <;> aesop

intro h
  have h2 : e.eval = ae.eval := by
    have h3 : ∀ (e : Expression p), (ofExpression? e).isSome → e.eval = (ofExpression? e).get.eval := by
      intro e he
      induction e with
      | const n => 
        simp [ofExpression?, eval, add_zero] at he ⊢
        <;> try { tauto }
      | var x => 
        simp [ofExpression?, eval, add_zero] at he ⊢
        <;> try { tauto }
      | add e1 e2 => 
        simp [ofExpression?, eval, add_assoc] at he ⊢
        <;> try { 
          rcases he with ⟨hae1, hae2, hae3⟩ 
          all_goals 
            simp [hae1, hae2, add_assoc] at *
            <;> try { tauto } 
        }
      | mul e1 e2 => 
        simp [ofExpression?, eval, mul_add, add_mul] at he ⊢
        <;> try { 
          rcases he with ⟨hae1, hae2, hae3⟩ 
          all_goals 
            simp [hae1, hae2, mul_add, add_mul] at *
            <;> try { tauto } 
        }
    have h4 : (ofExpression? e).isSome := by
      simpa using h
    specialize h3 e h4
    simpa using h3
  linarith [h2]

intro h
  have h1 : ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e := by
    simpa using h
  rw [h1]
  all_goals
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.ofExpression?]
    <;> aesop
    <;> try { tauto }
    <;> try { native_decide }

intro h
  have h1 : ofExpression? p e = some ae := by
    tauto
  rw [h1] at h
  -- Now we need to show that ae.eval = e.eval
  rcases e with (e | e | e | e)
  · -- e is a constant
    simp [h1, e, AffineExpression.eval] at *
    all_goals try tauto
  · -- e is a variable
    simp [h1, e, AffineExpression.eval] at *
    all_goals try tauto
  · -- e is an addition
    simp [h1, e, AffineExpression.eval] at *
    all_goals try tauto
    all_goals try { tauto }
  · -- e is a multiplication
    simp [h1, e, AffineExpression.eval] at *
    all_goals try tauto
    all_goals try { tauto }

intro h
  have h1 : ofExpression? p e = some ae := by 
    rw [h]
    all_goals simp
  have h2 : ae.eval = e.eval := by
    have h3 : ofExpression? p e = some ae := h1
    simp [h3, ofExpression?]
    <;> try { tauto }
    <;> try { aesop }
    <;> try { native_decide }
  exact h2

intro h
  have h1 : ae = AffineExpression.ofExpression? e := by 
    simpa using h
  rw [h1]
  all_goals
    simp [AffineExpression.eval, AffineExpression.ofExpression?]
    <;> try { tauto }
